text:
Created attachment 245576
spamassassin make log

Thank-you for picking up this ticket and taking the time to explain a method to capture what you need.  I hadn't come across "script" since FBSD2.2.5 (quite helpful)  :)

I usually rely on portmaster logs.  I followed your steps though I also "rm -R $WRKDIRPREFIX/*" prior to the make.
